item.name: Oil lighter
item.description_1st: This lighter has seen lots of use. At least it's full of oil.

item.name: Handkerchief with white flower
item.description_2nd: A small white flower is embroidered on it.

item.name: Romance film poster
item.description_1st: An image of some famous actors, walking under cherry trees.

item.name: Sharp knife
item.description_1st: A used sharp knife. Can cut anything.

item.name: Rusty knife
item.description_1st: It's covered in a dark red substance.
item.description_2nd: Might be useful, with some cleaning up.

item.name: Smartphone
item.description_1st: An old model from three generations ago. The battery is dead.

item.name: Red Ticket
item.description_2nd: Every time I get one, a bizarre memory resurfaces.

item.name: Apartment key
item.description_1st: There's not even a keychain. It's just a key.

item.name: Fire extinguisher
item.description_1st: If you get hit with this, it's all over.

item.name: Red wine
item.description_2nd: Cooking apples in it would impart a nice aroma.

item.name: Apple
item.description_1st: A bright red apple. Looks delicious.

item.name: Artificial fleabane
item.description_1st: Means "everlasting love" in hanakotoba. It will never wither away.
